heading: Why trust this Las Vegas nighttime safety guide
intro: This guide is built from real experience navigating the Las Vegas Strip, Fremont Street, and the surrounding areas at night — knowing where to go, where to avoid, and what the actual risks are after dark.

items.title: Strip-specific safety covered
items.text: The Strip at night is heavily surveilled and generally safe — but specific situations (targeted areas, taxi scams, drink safety) require awareness. This guide covers what actually happens to tourists at night in Vegas.

items.title: Fremont vs Strip comparison
items.text: Fremont Street and the Strip have different night vibes and different risk profiles. This guide tells you exactly what each is like and when each is the right choice for your trip.

items.title: Drink and personal safety covered
items.text: Drink safety, transportation scams, and knowing when to get into which vehicle — the specific Las Vegas nighttime risks that general safety guides gloss over.

items.title: No scare tactics
items.text: Las Vegas is one of the most surveilled cities on earth. The risks are specific and avoidable — not widespread. This guide gives you confidence to enjoy the night, not anxiety about it.

footer: If you want an honest guide to Las Vegas after dark — what is safe, what to watch for, and how to have a great night — this covers it.
